apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:

      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"},"name":"crdb-cluster","namespace":"cockroachdb"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"}},"serviceName":"crdb-cluster","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","exec /cockroach/cockroach start --logtostderr=INFO --insecure --advertise-host=$(POD_NAME).crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 --port=26257 --cache=25% --max-sql-memory=25% --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257"],"env":[{"name":"POD_NAME","valueFrom":{"fieldRef":{"fieldPath":"metadata.name"}}},{"name":"POD_NAMESPACE","valueFrom":{"fieldRef":{"fieldPath":"metadata.namespace"}}}],"image":"cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0","imagePullPolicy":"IfNotPresent","livenessProbe":{"httpGet":{"path":"/health","port":"http"},"initialDelaySeconds":30,"periodSeconds":5},"name":"db","ports":[{"containerPort":26257,"name":"grpc"},{"containerPort":8080,"name":"http"}],"readinessProbe":{"failureThreshold":2,"httpGet":{"path":"/health?ready=1","port":"http"},"initialDelaySeconds":10,"periodSeconds":5},"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"2Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"1","memory":"2Gi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/cockroach/cockroach-data","name":"datadir"}]}],"serviceAccountName":"crdb-cluster-sa","terminationGracePeriodSeconds":10}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"},"name":"datadir"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}},"volumeMode":"Filesystem"}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-24T03:45:55Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  resourceVersion: "971629"
  uid: d0edaee0-6eb3-4839-aeff-b3f8490a28f6
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - exec /cockroach/cockroach start --logtostderr=INFO --insecure --advertise-host=$(POD_NAME).crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local
          --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 --port=26257 --cache=25% --max-sql-memory=25% --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257
        env:
        - name: POD_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: POD_NAMESPACE
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.namespace
        image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 3
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        name: db
        ports:
        - containerPort: 26257
          name: grpc
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 2
          httpGet:
            path: /health?ready=1
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 2Gi
          requests:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 2Gi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
          name: datadir
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: crdb-cluster-sa
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 10
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
      name: datadir
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem

spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - exec /cockroach/cockroach start --logtostderr=INFO --insecure --advertise-host=$(POD_NAME).crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local
          --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 --port=26257 --cache=25% --max-sql-memory=25% --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257

        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:

          httpGet:

            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        name: db
        ports:

          name: grpc
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:

          httpGet:
            path: /health?ready=1
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 2Gi
          requests:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 2Gi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
          name: datadir
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: crdb-cluster-sa

      volumeMode: Filesystem

content.thinking:
The diagnosis is clear. The pods are running with `--join` flags pointing to each other, but the cluster hasn't been initialized yet. All 3 nodes are in the "waiting for init" state - they're all waiting for `cockroach init` to be called.

The configuration looks correct:
- All 3 nodes advertise with the correct hostnames
- They all join with the right list
- Insecure mode is set

The problem is simply that `cockroach init` has never been run. This is the standard CockroachDB bootstrap step - after all nodes are started, one of them needs to have `cockroach init` called against it to bootstrap the cluster.
Now I'll initialize the cluster by running the init command against the first node.

content.text: The diagnosis is clear. All 3 nodes are running correctly with the right `--join` configuration and advertise addresses. They're all in "waiting for init" state — this is expected behavior. The cluster just needs `cockroach init` to be called once to bootstrap it.
Cluster initialized. Now let me verify all 3 nodes joined and the cluster is SQL-ready.
